elements.visual_description: A minimalist living room with a sleek sofa, glass coffee table, and potted plants arranged neatly. The walls are bare except for a single abstract painting. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

elements.visual_description: A cartoonish calendar with every day marked with a red X, emphasizing the word 'every' in bold letters. The background is plain white. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

elements.visual_description: A stack of dollar bills arranged neatly on a wooden table, with a paycheck partially visible underneath. The lighting highlights the texture of the money. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

elements.visual_description: A cartoon-style graph with a rising line labeled 'level' pointing upwards. The graph is simple, with no numbers or detailed markings. The background is white. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
